mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_deduct_log SET status = 'DEDUCT_PROCESSING', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND sku_id = #{skuId} AND status IN ('DEDUCT_INIT','DEDUCT_FAIL')
UPDATE inventory_deduct_log SET status = 'DEDUCT_SUCCESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND sku_id = #{skuId} AND status = 'DEDUCT_PROCESSING'
UPDATE inventory_deduct_log SET status = 'DEDUCT_FAIL', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND sku_id = #{skuId} AND status = 'DEDUCT_PROCESSING'
